issues.description: DSL is missing the primary effect entirely. Card has two distinct effects: (1) Blocker ability triggered by opponent's attack declaration, and (2) DON!! x1 activated ability that sets character active at end of turn. Current DSL only captures a Rest action without proper trigger or context.
Trigger should be 'Counter' (for Blocker mechanic during opponent's attack declaration), not 'Activated'. Blocker is a reactive counter-trigger, not an activated ability.
Missing the core Blocker effect action. Should include action to make this card the new target of the declared attack, not just Rest.
Missing second effect entirely: the DON!! x1 activated ability with trigger 'EndOfTurn' that performs 'Rest' action (sets character active).
